zh.lifeSummary: 當Thibault de ROCHEFORT I於大約1195年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓洛福吉-特時，他的父親Alain de ROCHEFORT26歲，母親Anne de ROSTRENEN21歲。他和Emma de Donges至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1270年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛福特享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ROCHEFORT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Adrien, Andre, Armand, Cecile, Celine, Dany, Gaetan, Herve, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Lucien.
French: habitational name from Rochefort, the name of several places in various parts of France.
English: variant of   Ratchford  . Compare   Rochford  .

variants.name: Rocheford
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand.

variants.name: Ratchford
meanings: habitational name from Rochford (Worcestershire), from Old English ræcc ‘hunting dog’ (genitive ræcces) + ford ‘ford’.

habitational name from Rochford (Essex). Early forms of the name ending in Ro- suggest that the placename derives from Old English hrōc ‘rook’ or the Old English personal name Hrōc(a) + Old English ford ‘ford’, but the 13th century forms in Ra- and Re- suggest that the first element is Old English ræcc ‘hunting dog’.

nameMeanings.name: Thibault
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thibault de ROCHEFORT I was born about 1195, in Rochefort-en-Terre, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Alain de ROCHEFORT, was 26 and his mother, Anne de ROSTRENEN, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Emma de Donges. He died about 1270, in Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 77.

historicEvents.description: Attesté sous la forme latine Rupes Fortis en l'an 1260. Roc'h-an-Argoed en breton.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thibault de ROCHEFORT I est né environ 1195, à Rochefort-en-Terre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain de ROCHEFORT, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne de ROSTRENEN, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Emma de Donges. Il est décédé environ 1270, à Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thibault de ROCHEFORT I um 1195 in Rochefort-en-Terre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alain de ROCHEFORT 26 und seine Mutter Anne de ROSTRENEN 21. Er hatte mit Emma de Donges mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1270 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Emma de Donges. Morì circa 1270, nel Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thibault de ROCHEFORT Iが約1195年にフランスブレタグンモービハンロチェフォート-エン-テアで生まれた時，父Alain de ROCHEFORTは26歳，母Anne de ROSTRENENは21歳であった。彼はEmma de Dongesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1270年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメロチェフォートで77歳で死去した。

ko.Derval,44051,Loire-Atlantique,Pays de la: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 더발
ko.lifeSummary: Thibault de ROCHEFORT I(이)가 대략 1195년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 록헤포트--터르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alain de ROCHEFORT(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de ROSTRENEN(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Emma de Donges(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1270년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처테-마이팀 록헤포트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thibault de ROCHEFORT I nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Rochefort-en-Terre, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain de ROCHEFORT, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne de ROSTRENEN, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Emma de Donges. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1270, em Rochefort, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thibault de ROCHEFORT I родился около 1195 г. в местности рошефорт-ен-тирр, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Alain de ROCHEFORT было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de ROSTRENEN, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Emma de Donges. Он умер около 1270 г. в местности рошефорт, чаренте-маритим, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 77 лет.
